control_definition: Normal-control lung tissue from patients with primary spontaneous pneumothorax
inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset ipf_lung_core because direct lung case-control microarray cohort with explicit counts, though the control source is not healthy donor lung.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/ipf_lung_core.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
The comparator arm comes from pneumothorax tissue rather than healthy donor lung.
